tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The chords are barred...

[tab]Ab  4-6-6-5-4-4
Eb  x-6-8-8-8-8
Bb  6-8-8-7-6-6
Cm  x-3-5-5-4-3[/tab]

(note...singing comes in on the 5th time of the verse)


[Verse]

[tab]e|----------------------------------|
B|----------------------------------|
G|----------------------------------| x12
D|----------------------------------|
A|-1-3--1-3--1-3--1-3--11-3---------|
E|----------------------------------|[/tab]

I don't need to be anything other
Than a prison guard's son
I don't need to be anything other
Than a specialist's son
I don't have to be anyone other
Than the birth of two souls in one
Part of where I'm going, is knowing where I'm coming from


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
 I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Cm[/ch]
Anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
  All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Wondering what I've got to do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]e|----------------------------------|
B|----------------------------------|
G|----------------------------------| x12
D|----------------------------------|
A|-1-3--1-3--1-3--1-3--11-3---------|
E|----------------------------------|[/tab]

I'm surrounded by liars everywhere I turn
I'm surrounded by imposters everywhere I turn
I'm surrounded by identity crisis everywhere I turn
Am I the only one who noticed?
I can't be the only one who's learned


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
 I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Cm[/ch]
Anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
  All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Wondering what I've got to do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Can I have everyone's attention please?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
     If you're not like this and that, you're gonna have to leave[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
       I came from the mountain[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
       The crust of creation[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F7[/ch]
      My whole situation-made from clay to stone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
And now I'm telling everybody[/tab]


[Chorus] (played very lightly - louder at the end)

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
 I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Cm[/ch]
Anything other than what I've been trying to be lately[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
  All I have to do[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Is think of me and I have peace of mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
  I'm tired of looking 'round rooms[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Wondering what I've got to do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cm[/ch]
Or who I'm supposed to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm[/ch]
  I don't want to be anything other than me[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
I don't want to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
anything other than[/tab]


[Outro]
